name: Pinterest Board Downloader
description: Download all images from a selected Pinterest board. Note this tool needs access to Terminal.

name: SVG Line Animator
description: SVG stroke reveal animation tool. Upload paths, set origin point, control stagger, trail, and easing. Exports PNG frame sequences.

name: Scattered Bump Map Generator
description: Scatter logo PNGs across a canvas using Poisson disk sampling to generate seamless bump map textures for 3D rendering. Three independent layers with full scatter controls.

name: Animated Gradient Loop
description: Create a custom gradient map with adjustable stops and midpoints, then animate it as a seamless loop with configurable speed and direction. Export as a PNG sequence.

name: Default Office Grid
description: Generate the Default Office black and white random grid, and export as a PNG sequence

name: Nuclear Fusion Particle Sim
description: 3D particle simulation for lithium blanket nuclear fusion. Neutron emission, collision detection, helium/tritium products with trails and flash effects. Exportable as PNG sequence or layered ZIP.

name: Radial Dot Pattern Generator
description: Create precise radial dot patterns with customizable rings, spacing, and dot arrangements. Export as PNG.

name: WaveMesh Generator
description: Animated dot-grid pattern generator with wave modulation, tiling controls, and post-processing effects. Exports PNG sequences.
